warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Practice building complete complaint sentences using the pattern 'Der/Die/Das [noun] funktioniert nicht' and 'Ich habe ein Problem mit [noun]', with a focus on masculine/neuter article gender (der vs. das) for common hotel vocabulary.
speaking_prompt: Your room has a problem — the shower is cold or the window won't close. Go to the front desk and explain the issue. Ask if they can fix it or move you to another room.
carry_forward_errors: Nein danke, ich brauche keine Hilfe. / Keine Hilfe, danke. (was: Hilfe nicht.) — session 2026-04-29
